name: pSEO Solar Spain – ETL Master Pipeline

nodes.name: GEO – Fetch CSV from INE/CNIG
nodes.notes:
TODO: Replace URL with official INE endpoint if available.
Current fallback: codigos_postales CSV from GitHub mirror.
Alternative: https://centrodedescargas.cnig.es (requires auth)

nodes.name: PVGIS – API Request
nodes.notes:
PVGIS free API – no auth required. Rate limit: ~1 req/sec.
Returns E_y (annual kWh/kWp), H(i) (irradiation kWh/m2/day).

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: SELECT date_trunc('day', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days') AS start_date, date_trunc('day', NOW()) AS end_date

nodes.name: ESIOS – Build Date Range
nodes.notes:
Fetches yesterday's + today's ESIOS price data.
Indicator 10391 = PVPC tariff (EUR/MWh hourly)
